verdict: INCONCLUSIVE — within noise. Gen-matching COLLAPSED the gap 0.30->0.10 (largely apparatus, per this finding's title). The residual primary_delta 0.0365 carries NO confidence interval and the secondary within-open sanity bar FAILED (oo_h 0.770->0.613, delta -0.157), so 'real vendor divergence' is NOT supported. Single-run, underpowered; cf bootstrap_cliff_variance (wide, overlapping CIs).
corrigendum: 2026-06-24 self-audit: the original verdict ('RESIDUAL ROBUST / REAL vendor divergence, not apparatus') was an overclaim — it carried no CIs, its secondary sanity bar failed 3x, and it contradicted this finding's own 'largely apparatus' headline. Downgraded to INCONCLUSIVE. Raw measured numbers are unchanged; only the interpretation is corrected.
